Anamika Singh

HR & Talent Consultant | Stakeholder Engagement | Performance Programs | Recruitment Analytics | People-Centric HR

Hiring: AI Engineer (GenAI) | Gurgaon (Hybrid) 
We are looking for a highly skilled AI Engineer to build and deploy LLM-powered & agentic AI solutions in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment.
Key Skills:
Strong Python development (production-grade coding)
Experience with LLMs, RAG, Prompt Engineering
Hands-on with AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, SNS, DynamoDB)
Exposure to Agentic frameworks (LangChain, Autogen, etc.)
Knowledge of Terraform / CI-CD / Cloud-native development
Work on cutting-edge GenAI & AI Agents and build scalable enterprise solutions.
Interested candidates can share their resume at:
anamika.singh@manpower.co.in
#Hiring #AIEngineer #GenAI #LLM #PythonJobs #GurgaonJobs #AIJobs #TechHiring

extracted.full_content:
Pavan Sai K

Hi sukesh singuru
I've been working heavily with Databricks on AWS, Spark tuning, IAM/RBAC, and S3-based data platforms, so this stack feels very close to what I've been building lately.I’d love to bring that hands-on experience in workspace governance, cluster policies, and job orchestration to the role feel free to reach out at pavansaik660@gmail.com.

tejaswi@vectratek.com

View my newsletter

sukesh singuru

Executive Manager | Nebula Partners | Talent Strategy | Career Growth | Executive Coaching | Employer Branding | Recruitment Marketing | Leadership Excellence

Role: Cloud AI Data Engineer
Send me your Resume to my E- sukesh@nebulapartners.com 

Must have skills:
•   8+ years of experience required in administering Databricks workspaces in a cloud environment - AWS
•   8+ years of experience required with strong understanding of Databricks cluster configuration, job scheduling, and workspace management.
•   8+ years of experience required in managing user access, roles, and permissions using IAM, SCIM, and role-based access control (RBAC).
•   8+ years of proficiency with Apache Spark concepts, including performance tuning and troubleshooting.
•   8+ years of experience required in integrating Databricks with cloud storage services (e.g., S3,)
•   8+ years of experience required in implementing and enforcing cluster policies and workspace governance standards.
•   8+ years of experience required with familiarity with Databricks SQL, notebooks, and job orchestration.
